description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian with an elongated, distorted form, featuring exaggeratedly thin limbs and a stretched torso. The figure appears to be in motion, with one arm extended and the other bent, and the legs splayed in a dynamic walking or striding pose. The head is small and set atop a long neck, with minimal facial detail visible. The overall silhouette is highly stylized, with sharp angles and a sense of movement, suggesting an abstract or artistic interpretation of a human figure. The surface is smooth and uniform, with no visible clothing details or accessories. The proportions and geometry are not anatomically realistic, giving the figure a surreal, almost sculptural quality.
description: A highly stylized, elongated adult pedestrian figure in a dynamic walking pose, with thin limbs and a smooth, abstract surface.
description_view_0: The figure's side profile is visible, showing the long, thin limbs and extended arm, with the head and torso clearly outlined.
description_view_1: A more frontal angle reveals the exaggerated length of the legs and arms, with the limbs appearing almost ribbon-like.
description_view_2: The back and one side of the figure are visible, highlighting the stretched torso and the dynamic splay of the legs.
description_view_3: An angled rear view emphasizes the abstract, angular geometry of the limbs and the overall sense of motion.
